claim_boundary: External-run contract only: fixes the raw/fak command shape, shared model and simulator requirements, evidence paths, and promotion gates for a benchmark-native tau3 or ToolSandbox run. It is not an official result until external task definitions, raw/fak outputs, and native grader summaries are checked in.

arms.name: raw-toolsandbox
arms.command: $env:TAU3_TASK_IDS='<space-separated official task ids>'; tau2 run --domain retail --agent-llm shared-agent-model --user-llm shared-agent-model --num-trials 1 --task-ids ($env:TAU3_TASK_IDS -split ' ')

arms.name: fak-toolsandbox
arms.command: $env:TAU3_TASK_IDS='<space-separated official task ids>'; $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL='http://localhost:8080/v1'; $env:OPENAI_API_BASE='http://localhost:8080/v1'; tau2 run --domain retail --agent-llm shared-agent-model --user-llm shared-agent-model --num-trials 1 --task-ids ($env:TAU3_TASK_IDS -split ' ')
required_artifacts: fak verdict/evidence log linked to mediated tool calls

score_evidence_link.detail: The official compare artifact must join benchmark-native success/pass rows and trajectories to the mediated fak tool-call verdict and evidence checkpoint for the same task turn.

upstream_refs.name: Apple ToolSandbox
upstream_refs.notes: Official ToolSandbox CLI stores result_summary.json and trajectories under the repository data directory.

upstream_refs.name: tau3/tau2-bench
upstream_refs.notes: Current tau benchmark CLI documents tau2 run with domain, agent/user model, trials, task count, and outputs under data/simulations.

gates.name: candidate_task_ids
gates.detail: 1 candidate id from local smoke suite

gates.name: same_task_ids_required
gates.detail: raw and fak official runs must use the same benchmark-native task ids

gates.name: raw_arm_command
gates.detail: $env:TAU3_TASK_IDS='<space-separated official task ids>'; tau2 run --domain retail --agent-llm shared-agent-model --user-llm shared-agent-model --num-trials 1 --task-ids ($env:TAU3_TASK_IDS -split ' ')

gates.name: fak_arm_command
gates.detail: $env:TAU3_TASK_IDS='<space-separated official task ids>'; $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL='http://localhost:8080/v1'; $env:OPENAI_API_BASE='http://localhost:8080/v1'; tau2 run --domain retail --agent-llm shared-agent-model --user-llm shared-agent-model --num-trials 1 --task-ids ($env:TAU3_TASK_IDS -split ' ')

gates.name: official_harness_required
gates.detail: external tau3 or Apple ToolSandbox task/grader output is required before promotion

required_before_claim: benchmark-native task manifest or scenario ids for the selected tau3 or ToolSandbox subset
raw-arm benchmark-native output over those exact task ids
fak-arm benchmark-native output over those exact task ids
benchmark-native grader or result summary for both arms
proof that raw and fak arms used the same model, user simulator, task ids, budget, and retry policy
fak verdict/evidence log linked to each mediated tool call
raw/fak compare artifact reporting task success separately from policy compliance and benign utility preservation
